name: Marketing Funnel Tracker
description: Marketing Funnel Tracker - Marketing template for analytics professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Set Your Targets Go to the Funnel Targets tab. Define your target volume for each funnel stage for each month. These become your benchmarks. Step 2: Enter Monthly Actuals Use the Monthly Funnel tab. Each month, enter the actual number of leads/contacts at each funnel stage. Conversion rates auto-calculate. Step 3: Track by Channel The Channel Funnel tab breaks down funnel performance by acquisition channel — see which channels produce the highest-quality leads.
